title: Whisky Girl
content:
I like'em ragged round the rim,
        rough drawn at dawn
        panting at the edge,
        belly-button ring
        tattooed naval
        drinking silk panties shooters,
        not much in between
        if you know
        What I mean
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Whisky Girl"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
